response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic micro-services handling millions of req/s, AWS-based pricing platform), plus current AI-agent infrastructure work at Acme. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, statistical analysis, or telemetry/measurement systems — which are the core of this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. Title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal/IC6, and there is little evidence of cross-team platform leadership at the scope this role demands.
strengths: 15+ years across diverse stacks (TS/Node, C/C++, Java, DLang, Python-adjacent) exceeding the 8+ year bar
Real high-scale, low-latency production experience (Sociomantic micro-services, Direct Mail pricing at millions/year)
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, workshops, OSS test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or statistical/bias-detection experience
No evidence of building shared platforms used across multiple teams or Principal-level cross-org influence
Telemetry/metrics infrastructure and rollout-risk management not represented in the resume

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of engineering experience at scale
No clear Principal-level cross-team platform leadership
